details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest family-friendly room under $220/night
Task 2: Reserve earliest outdoor table with farm-to-table tasting menu
Task 3: Choose room based on kitchenette $40/night difference rule
Task 4: Plan same-day itinerary (tour + lunch + workshop)
Task 5: Order three jarred products with rating filter and subtotal rule
Task 7: Register two people for beginner-friendly workshop under $80
Task 8: Submit wedding quote inquiry for 80 guests with $15,000 budget
Task 9: Subscribe to newsletter (seasonal recipes + room offers, monthly)
